ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "whiskies" (
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each whisky */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the whisky */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the whisky (e.g., Single Malt, Blended) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Review score out of 100 */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the whisky in US dollars */,
  "review" TEXT /* Detailed review of the whisky */,
  "distillery" TEXT /* Name of the distillery */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the whisky in years */,
  "alcohol_percentage" REAL /* Alcohol percentage of the whisky */,
  "bottling_year" INTEGER /* Year the whisky was bottled */,
  "limited_release" INTEGER /* Indicates if the whisky is a limited release */,
  "available_bottles" INTEGER /* Number of bottles available for the limited release */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the whisky was produced */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the whisky was produced */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the whisky */,
  "nose" TEXT /* Notes on the nose of the whisky */,
  "palate" TEXT /* Notes on the palate of the whisky */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Notes on the finish of the whisky */,
  "editor_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the whisky is an editor's pick */,
  "cask_type" TEXT /* Type of cask used for aging the whisky */,
  "bottler" TEXT /* Name of the bottler */,
  "production_methods" TEXT /* Production methods used for the whisky */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for search and filtering */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the whiskies table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (out of 100) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the whiskies table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the whisky in stock */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Current price of the whisky in US dollars */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum discussion */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the discussion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
